blog_title: ₹40 vs ₹85 Plain T-Shirt Wholesale — Why Cheap Fabric Ruins Print Quality for B2B Buyers
caption:
500 pieces. Cracked prints. 2 days in the rain. 😬

A printer delivered during monsoon — fabric was damp before heat press. Moisture blocked adhesive bonding. Here's the fix: dry press fabric 5-7 seconds FIRST (no film), then 160°C for 15 seconds full press.

Save this if you're printing through baarish season 👇
